features: 🧴 6 × 185 ml Peony & Cedar Febreze Spray – Excellent value bundle, ideal for multi-room freshness
🍃 Powered by OdourClear Technology – Targets and eliminates odours at the source, not just masks them
🌸 Floral‑Woody Fragrance – Delicate pink peony meets green forest cedar for an elegant and refreshing aroma
🔥 Propellant-Free & Non‑Flammable – Safe for indoor spaces including bathrooms, kitchens & living areas
Premium Quality from P&G UK – Trusted brand known for long-lasting freshness and safety standards
description: Elevate your home atmosphere with the luxurious scent of Febreze Peony & Cedar Air Freshener Spray . This value-packed 6 × 185 ml bundle brings a beautifully balanced floral-woody fragrance inspired by pink peony blossoms and cedar forests. OdourClear Technology penetrates and neutralises unwanted smells at the source, leaving behind only clean and calming fragrance — not just a cover-up. Includes 6 cans of 185 ml each — perfect for multiple rooms or frequent use Exquisite Peony & Cedar scent — soft yet sophisticated Non‑flammable and propellant-free — safe around family, pets and sensitive noses Trusted Febreze quality from Procter & Gamble, manufactured in the UK Spray upright without shaking for best results. Always ventilate after use. Febreze – Freshness that lasts, fragrance that soothes.
